description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The exterior is finished in a warm yellow color, with numerous large windows of varying sizes distributed across all sides, allowing for ample natural light. The house features multiple levels, with open terraces and balconies visible on the upper floor, and a spacious ground-level patio area surrounded by trees and landscaping. The main entryway is accentuated by a wide staircase and a covered porch, while the garage is integrated into the structure. The property is bordered by a paved area and is surrounded by several mature trees, providing shade and privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A large, modern yellow house with flat roofs, many windows, terraces, and a landscaped patio surrounded by trees. The design is geometric and open, with integrated garage and multiple balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a wide staircase, arched window, covered porch, and garage entrance, framed by trees on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terraces and balconies, with more visible windows and a prominent patio area bordered by trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with large windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped area with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a secondary entrance, and more of the paved area and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows distributed across all sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, covered porch, arched window, and integrated garage
